title: Calculate Number of Purchase and Remaining Balance

content.problemStatement:
Write a C++ program that calculates how many items a user can afford based on the price of the item and their available balance. If the balance is less than the price, the program should inform the user that they cannot afford the item.

**Input:**
- Price of the item (floating-point).
- Available balance (floating-point).

---

sampleTestCases.output: Insufficient balance. You cannot afford this item.

You can purchase the item 3 times.
Remaining balance: 15
